---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ToastyKey
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve. What are you unable to do today?

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see implemented. How would it work from a user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already considered. Why are they insufficient?

## Provider / Integration

If this feature is specific to a provider, list it here.

e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, ElevenLabs, Cartesia, Replicate, Stability AI, or N/A

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples that help illustrate your request.
